---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Teaching — Davide Rolfi"
---

# Teaching

<p class="page-intro">
I have taught and supported students in finance, quantitative methods, VBA, financial mathematics, and one-to-one tutorials. My teaching interests include actuarial science, financial economics, portfolio theory, risk management, optimisation, applied statistics, and quantitative finance.
</p>

## Teaching Experience

::: {.paper-card}

### Teaching Assistant — Introduction to VBA

<p class="paper-meta">Bayes Business School · City St George's, University of London</p>

Supported an applied course on VBA programming and spreadsheet-based problem solving. The course introduced students to basic programming concepts in Excel and their use in financial and quantitative applications.

:::

::: {.paper-card}

### Marker — Introduction to Finance and Accounting

<p class="paper-meta">Bayes Business School · City St George's, University of London</p>

Marked student work for an introductory finance and accounting module.

:::

::: {.paper-card}

### One-to-one tutorials in mathematics and finance

<p class="paper-meta">Independent · Undergraduate and postgraduate students</p>

Provided individual tutorials for undergraduate and postgraduate students in mathematics, finance, and quantitative methods.

:::

## Teaching Interests

<p class="research-interests">
Actuarial science · financial economics · portfolio theory · risk management · optimisation · applied statistics · quantitative finance · financial mathematics
</p>
